name: Jerusalem
oracleText:
Jerusalem, City of the Great King enters the battlefield tapped.
{T}: Add {W}.
{2}{W}, {T}: Create a 1/1 white Citizen creature token. Activate only if you control a legendary creature.
flavorText: "It is the city of the great King." — Matthew 5:35
notes: Created from a checked Messianic Fulfillment card list item; first-pass mana, colors, and mechanics were added, but final tuning remains pending. Source boundary is anchored to Luke with Matthew, Mark, and John as support material per the Biblical-series timeline guide. Classics theme art uses Gustav Bauernfeind's "Jerusalem From The Mount Of Olives" via Wikimedia Commons.
title: City of the Great King

classics.license: Public domain; Wikimedia Commons hosts a faithful reproduction of a public-domain work.
classics.creditText: Gustav Bauernfeind, Jerusalem From The Mount Of Olives
classics.sourceNotes: A monumental city view fits Jerusalem’s great-king treatment well.
